serverInfo.name: cqhung1412-portfolio
serverInfo.description: Chiêm Quốc Hùng's portfolio — exposes structured data and navigation tools via WebMCP (browser-side only).

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.description: Returns structured contact information (email, LinkedIn, GitHub URLs)

tools.name: get_skills
tools.description: Returns skills and expertise organized by category

tools.name: get_experience
tools.description: Returns structured work experience (company, role, dates, description)

tools.name: get_cv_link
tools.description: Returns the URL to the downloadable CV PDF

tools.name: navigate_to_section
tools.description: Scrolls the viewport to a named section (About, Skills, Experience, Projects, Contact)
